verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We have a Message to the world We have a Message to save lost souls We have a Message to the sick and dying We've got to tell that Jesus saves We've got to tell that Jesus heals We have a Message that makes your life worth living

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Moses told the children of Israel "The Lord shall raise up a prophet Like unto me, and him shall ye hear" Truly Jesus came fulfilling All that Moses said Then died and rose, and gave us Salvation to declare

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We have a Message to the world We have a Message to save lost souls We have a Message to the sick and dying We've got to tell that Jesus saves We've got to tell that Jesus heals We have a Message that makes your life worth living

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Surely the Lord God will do nothing But He reveals His secrets to the prophets Like the one He has sent in our day He fulfilled Revelation 10 and 7 Malachi 4: 5 and 6 We now have the Seven-seal Message to declare

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We have a Message to declare We have a Message, "The end is near!" We have a Message to those souls that are thirsting What for ages had been sealed In our day has been revealed This is what has made our lives worth living

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Surely the Lord God will do nothing But He reveals His secrets to the prophets Like the one He has sent in our day He fulfilled Revelation 10 and 7 Malachi 4: 5 and 6 We now have the Seven-seal Message to declare

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We have a Message to the world We have a Message to save lost souls We have a Message to the sick and dying We've got to tell that Jesus saves We've got to tell that Jesus heals We have a Message that makes your life worth living

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We have a Message to declare We have a Message, "The end is near!" We have a Message to those souls that are thirsting What for ages had been sealed In our day has been revealed This is what has made our lives worth living

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We have a Message to the world We have a Message to save lost souls We have a Message to the sick and dying We've got to tell that Jesus saves We've got to tell that Jesus heals We have a Message that makes your life worth living

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We have a Message to declare We have a Message, "The end is near!" We have a Message to those souls that are thirsting What for ages had been sealed In our day has been revealed This is what has made our lives worth living

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: This is what has made our lives worth living
